name: al-lsp-for-agents
description: Code navigation, call hierarchy, and code quality diagnostics for AL (Business Central) — works with GitHub Copilot agent mode

languageModelTools.name: al_goToDefinition
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Navigate to where an AL symbol is defined. Use this when you need to find the source definition of a table, codeunit, procedure, field, enum, page, or any other AL object. Provide a file URI and position (line/character). Returns the file and location of the definition.

languageModelTools.name: al_hover
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get type information, procedure signatures, and record field lists for an AL symbol. Use this to understand what type a variable is, what fields a record has, or what parameters a procedure takes. Provide a file URI and position.

languageModelTools.name: al_findReferences
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Find all usages of an AL symbol across the project. Returns every file and location where the symbol is referenced. Use this before renaming or modifying a symbol to understand impact.

languageModelTools.name: al_prepareCallHierarchy
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get a call hierarchy item at a cursor position in an AL file. Use this to identify a procedure for subsequent incoming/outgoing call analysis. Provide a file URI and position on a procedure name.

languageModelTools.name: al_incomingCalls
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Find all procedures that call a specific AL procedure (its callers). Provide a file URI and position on a procedure name. Returns a list of calling procedures with their locations.

languageModelTools.name: al_outgoingCalls
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Find all procedures that a specific AL procedure calls (its callees). Provide a file URI and position on a procedure name. Returns a list of called procedures with their locations.

languageModelTools.name: al_codeLens
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get reference counts for all procedures in an AL file. Returns code lens items showing how many callers each procedure has. Use this to quickly identify unused or heavily-used procedures.

languageModelTools.name: al_codeQualityDiagnostics
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get code quality diagnostics for AL files: unused procedures (no callers), high cyclomatic complexity, too many parameters, high fan-in, and long methods. Use this to identify code smells and improvement opportunities. Optionally filter by file URI.

uri.description: File URI (file:///path/to/file.al) to filter diagnostics for a specific file, or omit for all files
